channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.thesixthaxis.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.thesixthaxis.com

item.title: The Blood of Dawnwalker launches on September 3rd
item.content:encoded:
Bandai Namco and Rebel Wolves have confirmed that The Blood of Dawnwalker will be releasing on September 3rd, during a Road to Launch livestream. As part of the showcase, a new story trailer for The Blood of Dawnwalker as well as a gameplay overview which shows different parts of the open world, the activities you can do within it, and different gameplay features.

Bandai Namco has also confirmed the different versions of The Blood of Dawnwalker that will be available. There is the normal standard edition, priced at £59.99, which will have a physical release as well as digital. The Eclipse Edition will include the game, a digital world compendium, the digital soundtrack, a digital prequel comic book, and a pre-order bonus of the Sangoran Wayfarer’s armour set. The Collector’s Edition will include the Eclipse Edition content plus SteelBook, a world map, and a Purearts Coen Figurine in a collector box.

The Blood of Dawnwalker is set in Europe during the 14th century, with the Black Plague wiping out people at a high rate. One of the people affected is Lunka, the sister of main character Coen. A vampire saves Lunka’s life, but has his own motivations to take advantage of humanity’s time of weakness to grab power and gain freedom, along with other creatures of the night. He also turns Coen into the Daywalker. Coen has vampiric powers but can navigate the world during the day. As the story of The Blood of Dawnwalker progresses, players will make choices on whether to try and remain human or use the vampiric dark powers, moving further away from humanity. You will also be able to use a combo of human and vampire skills in combat, with all sorts of foes from soldiers to other monsters being enemies. Allies could be found among any group too, be they human or a creature of the night. It all depends on the decisions you make as Coen.

The Blood of Dawnwalker will be available on PC, PS5, and Xbox Series XS.

Source: YouTube



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/04/28/the-blood-of-dawnwalker-launches-on-september-3rd/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
